# Original Candidate Description

This is the baseline `student.agent.md` as it existed before the optimization pass.

## Key Properties

- Evidence reading order: unspecified — approach lists artifacts but no sequence or precedence rule
- Engineer handoff trigger: vague — "when task needs specialized coaching or explanation needs clearer structure"
- Revision scope definition: absent — "smallest defensible revision" is undefined
- Teacher-approval criteria: absent — no explicit criteria for what counts as approval
- Contradiction handling: absent — no stopping rule when steering artifacts conflict
- Adjacent-issue handling: implicit — no instruction to note but not fix out-of-scope issues

## Predicted Judge Response

The judge would score the original as functional but under-specified. It correctly names the role and output format, but lacks the structural guidance needed for consistent, precise revisions. Scores likely in the 0.4–0.6 range for precision-sensitive criteria.
